title: the pretor
description:
a mod that adds a new dimension called the pretor.
and a lot more.
created by:crunku/pjam64,zant and mcreator
body:
it adds a new dimension called well the pretor and its BIG but so it doesent take too long i'll list the most important and cool 

## the pretor
dimension with every thing youl see writen
## mobs of the pretor
### pret
looks like a player and is neutral
### floater
floats and can be tamable
### amblet
carrys item
### presign
originaly a bug now a feature
## blocks of the pretor
### pretorack
netherack but pretor addition
### amber ore
now u can get amber
### redstone con block
bring a villager and its usefull
### colar
fluid of the pretor
## items of the pretor
### pouches
like bundles in a way
### pretor (name changing soon)
[SPOILER ALERT] with amethyst and this u may enter the pretor
### amber and pretrite
like iron and diamonds
## tips
use amber to make pretrite in a furnace.
u can sleep in the pretor.
theres a ton to explore so try it out.
